textByHashes.f06deee87b836a118bcbe0bd5e7bf6da86aa34e3: You flesh-temples always assume you can receive guidance merely by asking someone for it. But in this land there is a power that can teach us far more than any mere teacher could.
textByHashes.97e84e75d7847720415781d6393c4b5f7c2a2c85: I speak of the Dark Altar. For generations our wisest scholars have studied it, yet still it has capacities beyond our comprehension.
textByHashes.5e8866fd06bfb0690e8483f6ca278747d4d95f63: The Dark Altar can distort the dimensions, warping the fabric of reality as you perceive it, and even bridging the gap between life and death.
textByHashes.3fe34dba00447b3be033a1b4924683c970f21580: But you are still a flesh-temple; you require a corporeal body to house your soul, and you perform disgusting bodily functions to maintain it.
textByHashes.f6c081120914e6095c274a9ff0206698fd101d69: We of Arceuus have learnt, through the power of the Dark Altar, to move beyond the need for such a flesh- temple to house our souls.
textByHashes.d9b372a80684c63172d74199ab261091bed5fc61: In the crypt below us, we freed our souls from the flesh-temples that had imprisoned them, and we took the form you see now.
textByHashes.af0b07fa03aa3ec901f220147903a966e0487a37: Perhaps, if you allow the Dark Altar to work on your mind, one day you too will be able to ascend to our higher form.
textByHashes.8e5a0ac24a31e8809443f17c5b6ebb9a2fea9ccd: I fear you are far from comprehending it. Now, is there anything I can do for you?
textByHashes.88d4f96137f554f43086ad819b40393e3261ff1b: How disgusting - a flesh-temple that worships itself. Now, do you want anything?
textByHashes.7c6d6b83302523095b992795c85358cd017ccb7b: You sound like the Saradominist peasants from Hosidius, always assuming they must serve one god above all others.
textByHashes.40b8716afd69de3b1f4ccf3e812ef00523aa3622: While the gods are useful for tedious matters such as granting prayers during combat, we of Arceuus have long moved beyond the need to pay them homage.
textByHashes.2fa7d7d2b050c901646bea120200abecbd4dae5d: This is a place of meditation, where a novice may contemplate the mysteries of the Dark Altar - without venturing too close to its power.
textByHashes.2f744e469df1e31cc104fb7263c88ffd867b3279: Saradomin is popular with many uneducated citizens of Kourend, but you may use our church to worship any god you prefer. That would be an ecumenical matter.
textByHashes.d58af6fc3f479694838bd5aa8051ac172672b32c: Now, do you require anything of me?
